analysis.reasoning: Core message: Russia welcomed a UNODC–FIFA MoU aimed at strengthening international cooperation against corruption and crime in sport. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no criticism of the West. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – Not present; the cooperation is within UN and FIFA, not framed as an alternative to the West or Western order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – Yes; Russia 'welcomed' an international anti-corruption initiative, portraying itself as supportive of global cooperation and integrity in sport. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not present. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – Not present; no claim of Russian leadership or superiority. RU6 (Russia culture/nature) – Not present.
